instructions: Use retrieved context as the latest agency source of truth.
If retrieved context conflicts with older hardcoded prompt text, prefer retrieved context.
Do not invent services, team members, pricing, credentials, or private details.

chunks.content: 1. Company Overview Smart Scale Systems is an AI agency focused on delivering practical artificial intelligence solutions for organizations. Our mission is to help businesses automate repetitive work, extract insights from data, improve decision making, and deploy reliable AI systems. We collaborate closely with clients throughout discovery, planning, development, testing, deployment, and long-term support. Our approach emphasizes measurable business value, transparent communication, scalable architecture, and responsible AI practices. 2. Services AI Model Training includes custom model development, transfer learning, fine-tuning, evaluation, hyperparameter optimization, and deployment. AI Automation covers workflow automation, AI agents, CRM integration, document processing, and business process optimization. Computer Vision includes object detection, image classification, segmentation, OCR, quality inspection, and video analytics. NLP services include text classification, entity extraction, summarization, sentiment analysis, search, and document intelligence. LLM Solutions include RAG systems, prompt engineering, fine-tuning, evaluation, and enterprise assistants. Data Annotation covers image, video, text, audio, bounding boxes, polygons, segmentation, and quality assurance. AI Training Data includes dataset preparation, cleaning, balancing, augmentation, and validation. Custom Services provide tailored consulting and implementation. AI Model Training includes custom model development, transfer learning, fine-tuning, evaluation,

3. Team Founder: Muhammad Hashir Lodhi leads AI strategy, machine learning, automation, computer vision, and technical delivery. Marketing Expert: Muhammad Shahryar Lodhi manages branding, outreach, lead generation, and client relationships. AI Engineer: Muhammad Nouman Qadeer develops models, pipelines, integrations, and data workflows. AI Data Annotator & Labeling Expert: Muhammad Mudassir prepares high-quality datasets using rigorous quality assurance processes. 4. Project Workflow Projects typically begin with a discovery meeting to understand objectives, constraints, data availability, timelines, and expected outcomes. After requirement analysis, the team prepares a proposal with milestones. Development follows agile iterations with regular demonstrations. Testing validates functionality, accuracy, robustness, and usability. Deployment is planned carefully with monitoring and documentation. Support continues after launch to refine models and adapt to changing business needs. 5. Security & Privacy Client information is handled confidentially. Access is limited to authorized personnel. Project assets are stored securely. Data is used only for agreed purposes. When requested, non-disclosure agreements can be signed before work begins. Smart Scale Systems strives to minimize data retention and follows responsible AI practices, including transparency, fairness, and continuous quality review. 7. Frequently Asked Questions Q: How do I start? A: Email contact@smartscalesystems.tech with your requirements. Q: Do you build custom AI? A: Yes. Q: Can you integrate with existing software? A: Yes, where technically feasible. Q: Do you provide maintenance? A: Yes. Q: Can you annotate datasets? A: Yes. Q: Do you build RAG systems? A: Yes. Q: Can you fine-tune models? A: Yes. 11. Company Overview Smart Scale Systems is an AI agency focused on delivering practical artificial intelligence solutions for organizations. Our mission is to help businesses automate repetitive work, extract insights from data, improve decision making, and deploy reliable AI systems. We collaborate closely with clients throughout discovery, planning, development, testing, deployment, and long-term support. Our approach emphasizes measurable business value, transparent communication, scalable architecture, and responsible AI practices. 12. Services AI Model Training includes custom model development, transfer learning, fine-tuning, evaluation, hyperparameter optimization, and deployment. AI Automation covers workflow automation, AI agents, CRM integration, document processing, and business process optimization. Computer Vision includes object detection, image classification, segmentation, OCR, quality inspection, and video analytics. NLP services include text classification, entity extraction, summarization, sentiment analysis, search, and document intelligence. LLM Solutions include RAG systems, prompt engineering, fine-tuning, evaluation, and enterprise assistants. Data Annotation covers image, video, text, audio, bounding boxes, polygons, segmentation, and quality assurance. AI Training Data includes dataset preparation, cleaning, balancing, augmentation, and validation. Custom Services provide tailored consulting and implementation. AI Model Training includes custom model development, transfer learning, fine-tuning, evaluation,

preparation, cleaning, balancing, augmentation, and validation. Custom Services provide tailored consulting and implementation. 14. Project Workflow Projects typically begin with a discovery meeting to understand objectives, constraints, data availability, timelines, and expected outcomes. After requirement analysis, the team prepares a proposal with milestones. Development follows agile iterations with regular demonstrations. Testing validates functionality, accuracy, robustness, and usability. Deployment is planned carefully with monitoring and documentation. Support continues after launch to refine models and adapt to changing business needs. 15. Security & Privacy Client information is handled confidentially. Access is limited to authorized personnel. Project assets are stored securely. Data is used only for agreed purposes. When requested, non-disclosure agreements can be signed before work begins.
